creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #4)
> it makes sense [...] we have a helper
I'm afraid it doesn't, in this case.  Helpers, by definition, allow one to simplify things, write less, avoid boilerplate, don't repeat herself.  You're replacing already short and simple command with longer, hard-to-read macro.  There was nothing wrong with that line, and if it ain't broken, don't fix it.
